prompt: An original dark-fantasy striker soldier called Ember Cohort: an agile ember-wreathed spear-wielding fighter, lean armored build with glowing warm orange-red fire cracks running along the spear shaft and armor seams, cinder embers drifting off the weapon, cel-shaded 2.5D anime/game production art, painterly textures, high readability, full-body, three-quarter hero framing, clear weapon silhouette, agile forward-leaning grounded stance, dynamic warm ember-glow rim lighting, isolated on a perfectly uniform solid #FF00FF magenta background, no shadow outside the base, no text, no logos, no watermark, no copyrighted character likeness, original design only.
